cli.task.help: Task kernel inspection and approval commands.
cli.task_grant.help: Path grant inspection and revocation commands.
cli.auth_error.codex.local_login_missing: Codex provider now uses the OpenAI Responses API, but the local ~/.codex/auth.json login (auth_mode={auth_mode}) does not expose an OpenAI API key. ChatGPT/Codex desktop login alone cannot call /v1/responses. Set HERMIT_OPENAI_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY, or switch your local Codex auth to an API-key-backed login.
cli.auth_error.codex.requires_api_key: Codex provider now uses the OpenAI Responses API and requires HERMIT_OPENAI_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY.
cli.auth_error.codex_oauth.requires_loca: Codex OAuth provider requires a local Codex login with ~/.codex/auth.json.
cli.auth_error.missing_provider_auth: Missing authentication for the selected provider.

cli.preflight.error.claude_auth_missing: Missing Claude auth. Set `HERMIT_CLAUDE_API_KEY` / `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, or set `HERMIT_CLAUDE_AUTH_TOKEN` (usually together with `HERMIT_CLAUDE_BASE_URL`).
cli.preflight.item.codex_auth.label: Codex auth
cli.preflight.item.codex_auth.detail.mis: Detected local Codex login (auth_mode={auth_mode}), but no usable OpenAI API key is available
cli.preflight.error.codex_auth_missing_a: Detected `~/.codex/auth.json`, but the current login does not expose an OpenAI API key. ChatGPT/Codex Desktop login alone cannot call the OpenAI Responses API; set `HERMIT_OPENAI_API_KEY` / `OPENAI_API_KEY`, or use a local Codex auth state backed by an API key.

cli.preflight.item.codex_oauth.detail.in: Detected local Codex login (auth_mode={auth_mode}), but tokens are incomplete
cli.preflight.error.codex_oauth_incomple: Detected `~/.codex/auth.json`, but it does not contain a usable access_token / refresh_token.
cli.preflight.error.codex_oauth_missing: Missing Codex OAuth auth. Complete local Codex login first.
